task_completion.description: Verify that a 'Case' item for 'Google LLC v. Oracle America, Inc.' has been created in Zotero.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero middle pane (items list), there should be an entry titled 'Google LLC v. Oracle America, Inc.' with the 'Case' item icon (a scale of justice).

task_completion.description: Verify the metadata for the 'Google LLC v. Oracle America, Inc.' case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the 'Google LLC v. Oracle America, Inc.' item is selected, the right-hand pane should show: Court: 'U.S. Supreme Court', Date Decided: '2021-04-05', Docket Number: '18-956', Reporter: 'S. Ct.', Reporter Volume: '141', and First Page: '1183'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a 'Case' item for 'Sony Corp. of America v. Universal City Studios, Inc.' has been created in Zotero.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero middle pane, there should be an entry titled 'Sony Corp. of America v. Universal City Studios, Inc.' with the 'Case' item icon.

task_completion.description: Verify the metadata for the 'Sony Corp. of America v. Universal City Studios, Inc.' case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the 'Sony Corp. of America v. Universal City Studios, Inc.' item is selected, the right-hand pane should show: Court: 'U.S. Supreme Court', Date Decided: '1984-01-17', Docket Number: '81-1687', Reporter: 'U.S.', Reporter Volume: '464', and First Page: '417'.

task_completion.description: Verify that a 'Case' item for 'Authors Guild, Inc. v. Google, Inc.' has been created in Zotero.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Zotero middle pane, there should be an entry titled 'Authors Guild, Inc. v. Google, Inc.' with the 'Case' item icon.

task_completion.description: Verify the metadata for the 'Authors Guild, Inc. v. Google, Inc.' case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: When the 'Authors Guild, Inc. v. Google, Inc.' item is selected, the right-hand pane should show: Court: 'U.S. Court of Appeals for the Second Circuit', Date Decided: '2015-10-16', Docket Number: '13-4829', Reporter: 'F.3d', Reporter Volume: '804', and First Page: '202'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Zotero graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Zotero application window being interacted with, rather than terminal commands or scripts modifying the Zotero SQLite database directly.

integrity.description: Verify the agent created the items manually from scratch rather than importing them.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking 'New Item' -> 'Case' and manually typing into the fields in the right-hand pane, rather than using 'Import' dialogs or magic wand identifier lookups.

integrity.description: Verify the results are in the actual Zotero application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The metadata must be visible in the Zotero application's info pane, not just typed into a text editor, notes app, or a web browser.
